reason: Cytokine ranking is identical across round1 and round2 (IL-15 > IL-18 > IL-12 > IL-7 > IL-2). The lead arm IL-15 changes by only +1.87% live tumor count between rounds (1373.00 -> 1398.67), within the round2 3-replicate standard deviation (46.93). The round-2 change is a simulation-sensitivity adjustment, not new biological evidence, so stop and proceed to final report.
stopping_criteria: ranking order stable across round1 and round2
lead-arm live-tumor-count change within round2 replicate noise
do_not_overinterpret: in silico PhysiCell ranking only; human scientific review required before manuscript use
round-2 values are a simulation_sensitivity_proposal, not a literature-grounded fingerprint
